description_long: This is a large, rectangular office desk with a light gray wood finish and a classic, functional design. The front side features three drawers on the left and a single-door cabinet on the right, each with round, dark handles. The desktop is broad and flat, suitable for writing, computer work, or meetings, and has a subtle wood grain texture. The back side is plain, with solid panels and no visible storage, while the sides are also solid and unadorned. The desk sits on small, unobtrusive feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. Its overall appearance is clean, modern, and practical, making it suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A large, light gray wood office desk with multiple drawers and a cabinet, featuring a broad, flat work surface and a clean, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers on the left, a cabinet on the right, and a wide desktop with visible handles.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid panel with subtle wood grain and no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing plain, solid panels with no drawers or handles, and a recessed central section.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid panel, matching the left side, and no visible features.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features drawers and a cabinet, indicating this is the front; the plain panel side is the back, and the solid panels are the sides.
